text.title: Lookalike and Retargeting Audience Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: broad targeting outperforms layered audiences at this spend
no seed = no lookalike; collect events first, revisit in 60 days

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 500 AND first_party_data == true AND seed_size < 1000

conclusion.verdict: grow seed via longer window or higher-funnel events; use interest-targeting in interim

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 500 AND first_party_data == true AND seed_size >= 1000 AND exclusion_built == false

conclusion.verdict: build standing exclusion list before launching any new acquisition campaign

branch.when: spend_monthly >= 500 AND first_party_data == true AND seed_size >= 1000 AND exclusion_built == true

conclusion.verdict: wire monthly overlap audit + frequency cap; ship audience spec

example.trace: spend_monthly >= 500 AND first_party_data == true AND seed_size >= 1000 AND exclusion_built == true → conclusion ref="overlap-monthly-audit" verdict="wire monthly overlap audit + frequency cap; ship audience spec"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
